name: stoaix — V8 Satisfaction Survey Voice

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "sip_trunk_id":         "{{ $('Build JWT + Payload').item.json.trunk_id }}",
  "sip_call_to":          "{{ $('Build JWT + Payload').item.json.phone }}",
  "room_name":            "{{ $('Build JWT + Payload').item.json.room_name }}",
  "participant_identity": "sip-{{ $('Build JWT + Payload').item.json.phone.replace(/\\+/g,'') }}",
  "participant_name":     "{{ $('Build JWT + Payload').item.json.contact_name }}",
  "participant_metadata": "{{ $('Build JWT + Payload').item.json.agent_metadata.replace(/"/g, '\\"') }}"
}

notes: V8 Satisfaction Survey Voice. Triggered by post_appointment event (T+24h via wait node). scenario=satisfaction_survey. Agent calls save_survey_result() tool to store score. Callback by agent.py.
